speaker: SCRIVENER
text: Here is the indictment of the good Lord Hastings,

speaker: SCRIVENER
text: Which in a set hand fairly is engrossed,

speaker: SCRIVENER
text: That it may be today read o’er in Paul’s.

speaker: SCRIVENER
text: And mark how well the sequel hangs together:

speaker: SCRIVENER
text: Eleven hours I have spent to write it over,

speaker: SCRIVENER
text: For yesternight by Catesby was it sent me;

speaker: SCRIVENER
text: The precedent was full as long a-doing,

speaker: SCRIVENER
text: And yet within these five hours Hastings lived,

speaker: SCRIVENER
text: Here’s a good world the while! Who is so gross

speaker: SCRIVENER
text: That cannot see this palpable device?

speaker: SCRIVENER
text: Yet who so bold but says he sees it not?

speaker: SCRIVENER
text: Bad is the world, and all will come to naught

speaker: SCRIVENER
text: When such ill dealing must be seen in thought.
